summary: Excellent soundboard recording capturing a classic, vintage performance highlighted by a stellar China‑Rider, Smoking Playing in the Band, a dreamy Stella Blue and a magical Dark Star‑El Paso.
review: Both reviewers rave about this under‑appreciated show, calling it a flawless, full‑stride performance with every instrument firing on all cylinders. The Miller/SirMick soundboard master is praised as crystal‑clear and arguably the best it has ever sounded, making the standout sequences – China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, Playing in the Band, Stella Blue, and Dark Star > El Paso – truly shine.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are 5‑star and focus on exceptional musical moments plus a superb soundboard master, indicating a top‑tier show and recording despite the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Miller/SirMick mastering is described as never sounding better; reviewers note crisp, clear sound with no reported issues.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the set as a vintage, classic performance with seamless transitions and the band firing on all cylinders throughout.
